title: Guest Lecture Announcement
transcript: Good afternoon. The Department of Environmental Studies is pleased to announce a guest lecture by Dr. Elena Vargas, a leading researcher in marine conservation. The lecture, titled 'Protecting Coral Reefs in a Warming World,' will take place this Thursday at 4 PM in Lecture Hall B. Dr. Vargas will discuss recent findings on coral bleaching and strategies for reef restoration. A question-and-answer session will follow the presentation. All students and faculty are welcome to attend. Light refreshments will be served in the lobby afterward.

questions.stem: What is the topic of Dr. Vargas's lecture?
options: Protecting coral reefs in a warming world
questions.explanation: The announcement states the lecture is titled 'Protecting Coral Reefs in a Warming World.'

questions.stem: When and where will the lecture take place?
options: Thursday at 4 PM in Lecture Hall B
Friday at 3 PM in the student union
Wednesday at 5 PM in the auditorium
Thursday at 6 PM in the science building
questions.explanation: The lecture will take place this Thursday at 4 PM in Lecture Hall B.

questions.stem: What will happen after the lecture?
questions.explanation: The announcement says a question-and-answer session will follow the presentation.
